content:
# Dissolution Trapping

**Summary**: The trapping of CO2 by dissolving it into the formation brine.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-yusmananto|Yusmananto, 2024]] evaluated dissolution trapping in the Upper Kharaib Member.

## Scientific Context

- [[2024-yusmananto|Yusmananto, 2024]] Increases the capacity of a reservoir to hold CO2 by changing its physical state.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2024-yusmananto|Yusmananto, 2024]] Modeled using compositional simulation.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Injecting into the bottom interval results in increased mineral dissolution and higher percentages of dissolution trapping. ([[2024-yusmananto|Yusmananto, 2024, p. 120]])
